name: move_to_midpoint
description: Move to midpoint x:0 z:0 radius:2 to regroup with Bot2
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The X coordinate of the target midpoint to reach"), z: z.number().describe("The Z coordinate of the target midpoint to reach"), radius: z.number().describe("The proximity radius required to be considered at the target location") })
